name: sec-scan
description: Scan code for security vulnerabilities like hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS, and weak crypto with fix suggestions.
intent_triggers: 檢查有沒有硬編碼的 API key
幫我掃一下這個專案的安全性
看一下這段程式碼有沒有 SQL injection
掃描安全問題並給修復建議
run a security scan on my codebase
check for hardcoded secrets and tokens
scan for SQL injection and XSS vulnerabilities
generate a security report with fix suggestions
幫我檢查一下這個 repo 有沒有安全風險

path.description: File or directory path to scan

changed.description: Only scan files modified by the Agent

severity.description: Filter by severity: high, medium, low

fix_suggestions.description: Include fix suggestions in the report

examples.intent: 掃描整個專案的安全漏洞
產出包含修復建議的安全報告
